positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast graphic design featuring intricate line art of stylized flora and celestial elements. Depict abstract elements like crescent moons, geometric constellations, floating leaves, and delicate starbursts arranged in a balanced, repeating pattern. The style should evoke a blend of Art Nouveau and modern minimalist graphic design, emphasizing clean silhouettes and crisp edges. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, muted gold, and cream white. The composition must be highly centralized and suitable for repeating textile prints. The overall aesthetic should feel mystical, elegant, and eternally balanced.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, noise, low detail, messy, grainy, photorealistic, 3d render, hyperdetailed, cartoon, graffiti
